title: Manufacturing Engineer - Netafim India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Netafim India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Netafim India has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Netafim India:
Netafim India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netafim India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
